mapper.select: select rank_seq, rank_name, rank_order from rank order by rank_order
mapper.insert: insert into rank( rank_seq, rank_name, rank_order ) values(rank_seq.nextval, #{rank_name}, (select nvl(max(rank_order), 0) + 1 from rank) )
mapper.update: update rank set rank_name = #{rank_name} where rank_seq = #{rank_seq}
mapper.select: select count(*) from users where rank_seq = #{rank_seq}
mapper.update: update rank set rank_order = #{rank_order} where rank_seq = #{rank_seq}
